capture_coverage.claim_boundary: Capture coverage grades visual observability only; it cannot prove pinout, nets, voltage, or safe reuse.

lanes.request_prompt: Recapture the main components/connectors from another angle so single-photo claims can be cross-checked.
lanes.title: Cross-view confirmation

lanes.request_prompt: If accessible, capture the backside, solder side, cable underside, or hidden area so hidden routes and damage are not silently assumed.
lanes.title: Backside or hidden-area context

measurement_priorities.action: Measure continuity from USB-C VBUS to candidate power rail, and ground to ground plane.
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: VBUS to rail continuity < 1 ohm, ground continuity < 1 ohm, no short to ground.
measurement_priorities.why: Primary power input; must identify rail and verify no-short before powering.

measurement_priorities.action: Map pinout: identify pin 1, ground pins, 3.3V and 5V supply pins via continuity to known rails.
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Pin 1 identified, ground pins continuous to ground plane, 3.3V and 5V pins continuous to respective rails.
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: All supply and ground pins mapped.
measurement_priorities.why: Key interface for repair and salvage; supply pins must be known for safe power.

measurement_priorities.action: Measure unpowered resistance between each supply pin and ground to confirm no short.
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Resistance > 1 kohm for all supply pins to ground.
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: All supply pins show > 1 kohm to ground.
measurement_priorities.why: Ensure no short before applying power.

measurement_priorities.action: Map pinout: identify ground and supply pins via continuity to ground plane and power rails.
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Ground pins continuous to ground, supply pins (if any) continuous to known rail.
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: All ground and supply pins identified.
measurement_priorities.why: HDMI may carry power; must verify before use.

measurement_priorities.action: Map pinout: identify ground and supply pins via continuity.
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Ground pins continuous to ground, supply pins continuous to known rail.
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: All ground and supply pins identified.
measurement_priorities.why: eDP may have power rails; needed for salvage or reuse.

measurement_priorities.action: Map pinout: identify ground and any supply pins via continuity.
measurement_priorities.expected_evidence: Ground pin continuous to ground, no unexpected supply pins.
measurement_priorities.stop_condition: Pinout mapped and no short to ground.
measurement_priorities.why: Audio jack may have bias voltage; verify for safe use.

warnings: Do not apply power until ground continuity and no-short are verified on all candidate supply pins.
Visual labels are candidate only; actual pinout must be confirmed by continuity measurement.
Board model is identified as Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; use official documentation as reference but verify by measurement.
No damage observed in photos, but internal damage cannot be ruled out without thermal or electrical testing.
Salvage candidates (SoC, DRAM) require visual continuity and thermal pad integrity checks before removal.

field_action.on_fail: Continue topology capture; do not power/splice without measured topology.
field_action.on_pass: Compiler should emit a netlist or bounded envelope.
procedure: Use Qwen/vision to identify candidate connectors, rails, labels, and likely pin groups.
Measure ground continuity and power-to-ground no-short.
Measure rail voltage and polarity under current limit.
Submit topology_evidence.v1 or a versioned netlist and rerun the field operator.
field_action.summary: Capture measured topology or supply a versioned simulation netlist.
tools: Qwen vision pass for connector candidates
field_action.why: A required module/resource/design contract is missing or failed.

multiview_summary.source_policy: Repeated visual observations raise candidate confidence but do not prove pinout, nets, voltage, or safe reuse.

procedure: Use Qwen/vision to identify candidate connectors, rails, labels, and likely pin groups.
Measure ground continuity and power-to-ground no-short.
Measure rail voltage and polarity under current limit.
Submit topology_evidence.v1 or a versioned netlist and rerun the field operator.
omniscience_next_actions.prompt: Capture measured topology or supply a versioned simulation netlist.
omniscience_next_actions.why: A required module/resource/design contract is missing or failed.

omniscience_next_actions.prompt: Run the Unknown low-voltage board baseline protocol and attach trusted artifacts for: resistance, continuity, voltage, current, thermal, review.
Attach trusted continuity evidence with instrument id, calibration status, operator, timestamp, and artifact URI.
Attach trusted current evidence with instrument id, calibration status, operator, timestamp, and artifact URI.
Attach trusted resistance evidence with instrument id, calibration status, operator, timestamp, and artifact URI.
Attach trusted thermal evidence with instrument id, calibration status, operator, timestamp, and artifact URI.
Attach trusted voltage evidence with instrument id, calibration status, operator, timestamp, and artifact URI.
Create a topology_evidence.v1 record from measured connector pinout, continuity, no-short, voltage, current, and thermal observations.

visual_topology_readiness.next_unlock: Attach measured topology_evidence.v1 generated from the visual measurement queue.
